because.text: Adopted per Decision Process: review gate 4/>=3 with zero dissent (Kimi, Gemini, Codex-concession, DeepSeek), every review answering the decision criterion in the negative. Book I s1.1 rewritten on DeepSeek's textual base merged with Codex's MUST-NOT clauses: node bytes only; blob absence/availability/corruption MUST NOT change eval results or serialize as Book I DISSONANCE. EV-LIT-FORCE note + vectors.json format note strengthened per Codex's no-blob-vectors rule; oracle unchanged (already conformed). Supersedes-in-scope the DeepSeek v0.4.2 on-demand-validation settlement: the rule survives as a storage contract at blob retrieval. Prose-only for Book I: every v0.5.0 result hash, outcome and cost unchanged.

subject.note: ADOPT ADR-004 in v0.5.1 (LITERAL blob validation outside eval)
